channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Spray painted parking sign, 9th April
item.description:
Someone had spray painted parking sign, please repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Denmark Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 9th April
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge for collection please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bicycle Rack, 9th April
item.description:
This metal bicycle rack/stand at this location has been hit by a vehicle and is badly damaged. There is also quite a bit of concrete debris around, just on the pavement, road is clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornton's Alley, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray painted parking, 9th April
item.description:
Someone has spray painted parking sign on corner of camberwell station road outside car repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 377, Camberwell Station Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly damaged pavement in Chequers Way N13 6DA, 9th April
item.description:
The area of pavement outside 23/25 Chequers Way is badly cracked & uneven making it a trip hazard. This pavement is used by the local population as well as small children walking to Oakthorpe Primary School in nearby Tile Kiln

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chequers Way, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose manhole cover and frame, 9th April
item.description:
This has been loose for several weeks. A loud clattering noise is made every time a vehicle drives over it. The larger the vehicle the louder the noise. Especially loud at night when lorries drive over the manhole. Can be heard from my bed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lime, 9th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatcham Street, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A dead fox on the pavement., 9th April
item.description:
A dead fox on the pavement. It’s quite big so you sort of have to dodge it if walking on the pavement. I think it must have only just happened as it’s bleeding very red blood. It’s near no.64 southborough road. On the corner past Blenheim Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs dumped by bus stop, 9th April
item.description:
Dining chairs dumped by bin and bus stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatcham Street, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 102 Chatsworth rubbish disposal, 9th April
item.description:
Here we go again! I report, you clean up and 102 think it’s all normal! Flies and fox poo are part of the mix this time!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near entry to regents park, 9th April
item.description:
Street sign damaged and blocking footway on the entry to Regent's Park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Gloucester Gate, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned forest bike, 9th April
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatcham Street, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Santander bike, 9th April
item.description:
Same bike seen last night on Pretoria avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Forest Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Replace the sign, 9th April
item.description:
This sign used to tell us about the house, the view and even the trees. Can it be replaced?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip?, 9th April
item.description:
A few black bins left on pavement around this area, just by corner shop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report parking permit sign, 9th April
item.description:
Another parking permit sign has been spray painted on this road, I’ve just done another report for two further up the road. This one is outside no 131. Please repair and perhaps think about putting it up higher or involve police to try to catch who is doing this? thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Denmark Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The rubbish dumped IS COUNCIL PROPERTY ! Up until a few weeks ago the rubbish was collected by your employees whenever there was rubbish left in this space OUTSIDE THE BLOCK OF FLATS ON OR NEAR THE PATHWAYS WHICH BROMLEY COUNCIL IS RESPONSIBLE FOR. Some has now been collected but a couple of tge black sacks have been left behind and there is now a large double mattress there as well !! If this not dealt with I WILL be informing local councillor as rats will be moving in before long, 9th April
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two yellow plastic barriers and broken concrete posts need removing, 9th April
item.description:
Two yellow plastic barriers and 2 broken concrete posts need removing from opposite properties 180 and 164 Rectory Lane …they have been left there for months. Could pose a trip hazard for playful children at nearby Hope school or St Peter Chanel. They are also an eye sore…
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th April
item.description:
Graffiti on public litter bin at this bus stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 249, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x parking permit signs spray painted, 9th April
item.description:
This keeps happening in this area people spray painting parking permit signs to get out of paying for parking. Please come to repair and also please think about reporting to police or taking better precautions like putting signs up higher. One sign is outside no 143 and the other is outside 137. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Denmark Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
